testcase.name: test_subscription_demo_mode_unlocks_enterprise

failure.message:
AssertionError: plan=starter body={'plan': 'starter', 'status': 'trial', 'planName': 'Starter', 'planNameAr': 'البداية', 'yearlyPriceUsd': 149, 'features': ['pos', 'orders', 'products', 'categories', 'qr_menu', 'reports_basic'], 'limits': {'maxBranches': 1, 'maxUsers': 2}, 'trialEndsAt': '2026-06-04T13:53:21.373Z', 'currentPeriodEnd': None, 'cancelAtPeriodEnd': False, 'pendingDowngradePlan': None, 'daysLeft': 14, 'readOnly': False, 'usage': {'branches': {'used': 0, 'max': 1, 'unlimited': False}, 'users': {'used': 1, 'max': 3, 'unlimited': False}}, 'paddleConfigured': False} assert 'starter' == 'enterprise'
- enterprise + starter

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: plan=starter body={'plan': 'starter', 'status': 'trial', 'planName': 'Starter', 'planNameAr': 'البداية', 'yearlyPriceUsd': 149, 'features': ['pos', 'orders', 'products', 'categories', 'qr_menu', 'reports_basic'], 'limits': {'maxBranches': 1, 'maxUsers': 2}, 'trialEndsAt': '2026-06-04T13:53:21.373Z', 'currentPeriodEnd': None, 'cancelAtPeriodEnd': False, 'pendingDowngradePlan': None, 'daysLeft': 14, 'readOnly': False, 'usage': {'branches': {'used': 0, 'max': 1, 'unlimited': False}, 'users': {'used': 1, 'max': 3, 'unlimited': False}}, 'paddleConfigured': False} assert 'starter' == 'enterprise'
- enterprise + starter

testcase.name: test_qr_orders_list

failure.message:
AssertionError: Error 
Error: Failed query: 
    SELECT
      o.id, o.table_number, o.status, o.created_at, o.kitchen_ready_at,
      o.customer_name, o.customer_phone, o
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = .status_code

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: Error 
Error: Failed query: 
    SELECT
      o.id, o.table_number, o.status, o.created_at, o.kitchen_ready_at,
      o.customer_name, o.customer_phone, o
    assert 500 == 200
     +  where 500 = .status_code

testcase.name: test_full_lifecycle

skipped.message: master-password already configured for demo tenant from a prior run; create+verify-correct cannot be tested without resetting DB. verify-wrong path is tested separately below.
